system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 7
Type: Counter
Qi: 2

You assume a calm fighting stance, clasping your hands together and building your internal energy to protect against energy Attacks. When someone Attacks you with a Neigong Technique this increases your Parry and Hardiness. Make a Meditation Skill roll against TN 7. On a Success your Hardiness and Parry rise by 1 per Rank of Neigong (against Neigong Attacks) for this round. On a Total Success the effect lasts two rounds. This only works against melee based Neigong Techniques. Cathartic: This automatically triggers a Qi Duel against any opponent making a melee energy Attack against you (provided you both meet the require ments). For the purposes of the Duel add +1d10 to your Qi Rank. If your opponent has at least 2 Qi Ranks less you do, this completely blocks the attack.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
